category_sources: Official repository describes it as OneDrive Client for Linux with sync and configuration documentation: https://github.com/abraunegg/onedrive
source_facts.description says it performs folder synchronization with OneDrive.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is OneDrive Client for Linux: https://github.com/abraunegg/onedrive
source_facts.name is onedrive-cli, the Homebrew formula name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki contains the project FAQ.
Official README says all documentation is maintained in the repository docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/abraunegg/onedrive; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository topics and README identify OneDrive, Linux, sync, business/personal OneDrive, and Office 365 usage.
